raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "box_2 (light brown) is on top of box_1 and attached to it, so lifting box_1 directly could drag box_2 and cause instability; the left arm can reach the top surface of box_2 without colliding with the table or box edges.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is constrained by gentle downward pressure from the left end-effector, reducing the risk of box_2 shifting while separating box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "With box_2 stabilized, there is lateral clearance at the sides of box_1 for the right end-effector to establish a firm pinch/brace grasp without needing the claw (box is 30 cm, too large for claw).",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely controlled by the right end-effector while box_2 remains stabilized by the left end-effector."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "A short lateral motion path on the tabletop is free so box_1 can be sheared out from under box_2; left arm maintains stabilizing pressure on box_2 to prevent it from moving with box_1 despite attachment.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is separated enough from the box_2 contact/attachment region to allow a clean lift; box_2 remains on the table."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is no longer blocked from above by box_2 and has accessible opposing side faces; both arms can reach without collisions and provide sufficient squeezing force to lift a 30x30x30 cm box without the claw.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely grasped with two arms and lifted clear of the tabletop."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: box_2 (light brown) is on top of box_1 and attached to it, so lifting box_1 directly could drag box_2 and cause instability; the left arm can reach the top surface of box_2 without colliding with the table or box edges.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is constrained by gentle downward pressure from the left end-effector, reducing the risk of box_2 shifting while separating box_1.

parsed_json.Precondition: With box_2 stabilized, there is lateral clearance at the sides of box_1 for the right end-effector to establish a firm pinch/brace grasp without needing the claw (box is 30 cm, too large for claw).
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely controlled by the right end-effector while box_2 remains stabilized by the left end-effector.

parsed_json.Precondition: A short lateral motion path on the tabletop is free so box_1 can be sheared out from under box_2; left arm maintains stabilizing pressure on box_2 to prevent it from moving with box_1 despite attachment.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is separated enough from the box_2 contact/attachment region to allow a clean lift; box_2 remains on the table.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is no longer blocked from above by box_2 and has accessible opposing side faces; both arms can reach without collisions and provide sufficient squeezing force to lift a 30x30x30 cm box without the claw.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely grasped with two arms and lifted clear of the tabletop.
